message:
feat(backup): add scheduled backup support with flexible schedule parsing

Implement automatic backup scheduling for wa databases:

backup.rs (+258 lines):
- BackupSchedule enum: Hourly, Daily, Weekly, Monthly schedule types
- Parse schedule strings: "hourly", "daily", "daily@03:00",
  "weekly@sunday-03:00", "monthly@1-03:00"
- Calculate next_run_at() for schedule-based triggering
- Duration until next backup for timer/scheduler integration
- Weekday parsing (Sunday, Monday, etc.) for weekly schedules
- Day-of-month handling for monthly schedules
- Default schedules: hourly=:00, daily=03:00, weekly=Sunday 03:00

config.rs (+60 lines):
- Add BackupConfig section to main Config struct
- enabled: bool for toggling scheduled backups
- schedule: String for schedule specification
- max_backups: usize for retention (default 7)
- backup_dir: Optional override for backup destination
- compress: bool for gzip compression (default true)
- verify: bool for post-backup integrity check (default true)
- Config loading integration with TOML parsing

Example config.toml:
```toml
[backup]
enabled = true
schedule = "daily@03:00"
max_backups = 14
compress = true
```

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
